concept: Side-scrolling run-and-gun platformer focused on precision movement, weapon-level management, and traversal upgrades. Core loop: navigate interconnected 2D stages, jump/dodge hazards, and swap between distinct weapons while collecting triangular EXP to level each weapon from 1→3; taking damage spills EXP and can de-level weapons, reducing damage and fire patterns. Movement emphasizes tight control, variable-height jumps, recoil/knockback handling, water buoyancy and currents, fans/wind, and environmental traps (spikes, crushers). Arsenal includes weapons with unique utility and ammo rules—e.g., basic pistol that can upgrade into a powerful charge-beam, a machine gun that can propel the player upward when fired downward at higher levels, bouncing fireballs for corridor control, arcing blades for close-range burst, and missiles with splash damage and capacity upgrades. Progression layers: permanent max-HP increases via Life Capsules; missile capacity expansions; key mobility items (Booster jetpack variants with different thrust behaviors, and gear that enables extended underwater traversal). Bosses are pattern-driven, multi-phase checks that reward positioning, invulnerability-window awareness, and mid-fight weapon swapping; healing opportunities are limited to save/refill stations, so resource preservation matters. Level structure is hub-and-spoke with backtracking and optional secrets; some weapons/items are mutually exclusive or permanently upgraded, creating divergent builds and routing. Many ports add challenge modes such as Boss Rush/Time Attack that distill combat and movement mastery.
name: Cave Story
